case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. TESHEANNA JOHNSON ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 71956752) AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TASHEANNA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TASHEANNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 841 JAMESTOWN AVENUE UNIT # 105 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 71956752)** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY**
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TASHEANNA DOES 1 TO 5
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TASHEANNA DOES 1 TO 5
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 71751900) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE 0 UNLAWFUL DETAINER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TASHEANNA DOES 1 TO 5
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 422)

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 71956752), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED JAN-18-2024, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TASHEANNA
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 71984650)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TASHEANNA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, TASHEANNA DOES 1 TO 5
